subcodes.first_line: O thou fish of the fathomless ocean! As his highness Jonah (upon him be peace!) became familiar with the interior
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ماهی دریای بی پایان حضرت یونس علیه السلام چون مونس درون حوت طبایع و عناصر
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
